name: Diabetic Popovers
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the flour and salt together; set aside.
2. Beat the eggs and skim milk, then add to the flour mixture.
3. Mix until smooth and creamy.
4. Pour into heated greased muffin tins, filling each about half full or less.
5. Bake at 375°F for 50 minutes, or until popovers are golden brown and sound hollow when tapped.
DO NOT OPEN THE OVEN FOR THE FIRST 40 MINUTES.
1 serving contains approximately 1/2 bread calories and 1/8 meat calories.
